sub_modules.fft16_pair_index: Combinational address generator for the current radix-2 DIT butterfly pair and twiddle index.
sub_modules.fft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient lookup table for N=16.
sub_modules.fft16_butterfly: Combinational fixed-point complex radix-2 butterfly with FFT/IFFT twiddle sign selection.
sub_modules.fft16_output_scale: Combinational output normalization block that divides IFFT results by N=16 and leaves FFT results unscaled.
